goal: Add a side-effect-free decision gate for BPK-076 memory cache audit export preview evidence, accepting explicit approve/defer/reject decisions without writing files, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, routes, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes.
scope_out: Do not write export files, add durable storage, DB writes, filesystem cache files, scheduler, routes, package changes, workflow changes, deployment files, or external calls.
claims: Audit export preview evidence can be converted to an operator decision without writing files.
Ready BPK-076 evidence and explicit decision refs are required.
assumptions: Approved decision gates only authorize a later task lock, not export persistence in this task.
dod: Approved, missing decision ref, and rejected or blocked evidence cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: File writes, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, route, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-076 bundled memory cache audit export preview evidence without writing files.
